notes: v1.12: naya naam 'Bulk Uploader'. RDP/Server fix (installer khud WebView2 install karta hai), multi-tasking (analytics + posting ek sath), Business Manager ke SAARE pages fetch, account par Remove button + ek click me saare pages enable/disable, sidebar chhupane ka toggle, License status card (Activate/Renew), account naam poora dikhta hai. Plus fixes: Play crash, Save button, Drive folder khatam hone ka message, auto-update loop.
